The '''Pluthan asteroid belt''' was an [[Asteroid field/Legends|asteroid belt]] located in [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].

==History==
After the [[Declaration of a New Republic/Legends|rise]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], [[Krova (Hutt)|Krova]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] was captured by the [[Dug/Legends|Dug]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Langro Dis]] in the [[Pluthan system/Legends|Pluthan system]], near the Pluthan asteroid belt. The [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] was then brought to [[Alvorine]] for trial.<ref name="THH" />

==Appearances==
*{{GamerCite|5|The Hutt Hit}} {{1stm}}
